allow: Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh normal "Eevee sitting alert in a sunlit forest meadow, head tilted cutely, fluffy tail, golden hour light streaming through tall trees, dappled sunlight, floating pollen motes, tall soft grass and wildflowers, warm amber and beige palette, wholesome peaceful painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition, anime game art style")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh fire "Charizard roaring with wings spread wide, breathing a massive stream of bright yellow and orange fire from its mouth, perched atop a volcanic crater rim, rivers of glowing lava below, molten rock mountains in distance, glowing embers and ash drifting, intense orange and crimson palette, dramatic rim lighting, epic dragon scene painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh water "Blastoise emerging powerfully from crashing ocean waves, twin hydro cannons extended from its shell firing massive jets of water creating mist rainbows, sea foam splashing, deep teal ocean with stormy clouds in distance, lightning flashing on horizon, powerful coastal battle atmosphere, deep blue and aqua palette, painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh grass "Venusaur standing in an ancient overgrown jungle clearing, the massive pink flower on its back in full bloom releasing golden pollen and glowing spores catching shafts of sunlight, thick vines and primordial ferns surrounding, ancient moss-covered stone ruins half-swallowed by roots, deep emerald green and jade palette, mystical painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh electric "Pikachu unleashing a massive thunderbolt from its cheeks, yellow electricity arcing across a stormy sky, standing atop a rocky outcrop with bolts of lightning striking the ground around it, heavy dark storm clouds overhead, bright yellow and electric blue palette, sparks flying, kinetic action pose, cinematic painterly digital art, wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh ice "Articuno the legendary ice bird soaring over a frozen tundra, wings outstretched leaving a trail of ice crystals and snowflakes, aurora borealis in cyan and teal shimmering above, crystalline glacier formations below, snowstorm drifting, ethereal mist, legendary icy blue and white palette, mythical painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh fighting "Lucario in a dynamic martial arts stance with glowing blue aura flowing from its body, a crackling blue aura sphere charged in its paws, shattered boulders and rock debris flying and levitating around it in mid-air, dusty training ground with cracked stone pillars, dramatic golden rim lighting, steel blue and crimson palette, kinetic martial action painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh poison "Nidoking the purple horned rhino Pokemon roaring with toxic purple gas pouring from its mouth, standing in a rugged rocky wasteland laced with bubbling toxic pools of acid green liquid, radioactive-green and violet smoke wisps rising, skeletal dead trees silhouetted against sickly sky, sickly purple and acid green palette, intimidating painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh ground "Garchomp the dragon land shark erupting from a sand dune, jagged fins raised, jaws open with a roar, sandstorm swirling around, cracked desert canyon with distant mesas, dust pebbles and shards flying, fierce predator pose, burnt orange and rust palette, dramatic painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh flying "Staraptor the fierce bird Pokemon in mid-flight diving through the sky, wings spread wide, sharp gaze forward, breaking through scattered clouds high above a mountain range, sun piercing through clouds with dramatic god rays, loose feathers catching golden light, vast open sky atmosphere, sky blue and warm amber palette, cinematic painterly digital art, wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh psychic "Alakazam the psychic Pokemon levitating cross-legged with two silver spoons bent floating around him, mustache flowing, eyes glowing violet, surrounded by swirling psychic energy and broken geometric fragments, warped reality with fractal patterns in the background, deep indigo cosmos with scattered stars, ethereal violet and magenta palette, surreal painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh bug "Volcarona the sun moth Pokemon hovering majestically with its six large glowing wings spread wide, fiery embers and shimmering golden scales falling from its wings like sparks, inside a sacred flowering forest at dusk with drifting fireflies and massive glowing flowers, warm amber and ember orange palette, mystical painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh rock "Tyranitar the massive armored kaiju Pokemon roaring mightily, summoning a massive sandstorm that whirls around it, cracked earth and shattered boulders at its feet, rocky cliffs and mesa landscape behind, dust-choked sky, intimidating monstrous scale, dark gray and sandy brown palette, cinematic painterly digital art, epic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh ghost "Gengar the grinning shadow Pokemon phasing menacingly through the wall of a haunted gothic cathedral, shadowy tendrils reaching out from its body, glowing red eyes, purple flames flickering in stone sconces, broken stained glass and gothic arches, eerie blue moonlight streaming through, haunted purple and bruise violet palette, spooky painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh dragon "Dragonite the legendary orange dragon Pokemon flying majestically over a sea of clouds at sunrise, wings stretched wide, orange scales catching warm dawn light, distant snow-capped mountain peaks poking through the cloud sea, rays of dawn light streaming, majestic warm amber and sky gold palette, sweeping epic painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh dark "Umbreon the black moonlight Pokemon standing in a moonlit forest clearing, yellow rings on its body glowing with inner light, piercing red eyes, shadowy silhouetted trees, full moon overhead casting blue light, low mist clinging to the ground, mysterious deep indigo and shadow black palette, atmospheric painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh steel "Metagross the four-legged steel psychic Pokemon hovering menacingly over a high-tech industrial fortress, plasma energy crackling between its claws, electric sparks flying, cold steel mechanical architecture below with glowing blue circuitry, chrome and cerulean lighting, futuristic titanium and azure palette, imposing painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")

Bash(bash scripts/gen.sh fairy "Sylveon the graceful fairy Pokemon in an enchanted dreamscape garden, pastel pink and cream ribbons flowing gracefully around its body, surrounded by floating cherry blossom petals and glowing fairy light orbs, soft pink and white clouds, dreamy bokeh, soft pastel pink cream and periwinkle palette, magical ethereal painterly digital art, cinematic wide composition")
